segments.text: Now the children of Reuben and the children of Gad had a very great multitude of livestock; and when they saw the land of Jazer and the land of Gilead, that indeed the region was a place for livestock
the children of Gad and the children of Reuben came and spoke to Moses, to Eleazar the priest, and to the leaders of the congregation, saying:
Ataroth, Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Shebam, Nebo, and Beon
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: the country which the Lord defeated before the congregation of Israel, is a land for livestock, and your servants have livestock
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: If we have found favor in your sight, let this land be given to your servants as a possession. Do not take us over the Jordan
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: Moses said to the children of Gad and to the children of Reuben:
Shall your brethren go to war while you sit here?
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Now why will you discourage the heart of the children of Israel from going over into the land which the Lord has given them?
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Thus your fathers did when I sent them away from Kadesh Barnea to see the land
For when they went up to the Valley of Eshcol and saw the land, they discouraged the heart of the children of Israel, so that they did not go into the land which the Lord had given them
So the Lord's anger was aroused on that day, and He swore an oath, saying:
Surely none of the men who came up from Egypt, from twenty years old and above, shall see the land of which I swore to Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, because they have not wholly followed Me
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: except Caleb the son of Jephunneh, the Kenizzite, and Joshua the son of Nun, for they have wholly followed the Lord
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: So the Lord's anger was aroused against Israel, and He made them wander in the wilderness forty years, until all the generation that had done evil in the sight of the Lord was gone
And look! You have risen in your fathers' place, a brood of sinful men, to increase still more the fierce anger of the Lord against Israel
For if you turn away from following Him, He will once again leave them in the wilderness, and you will destroy all these people
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Then they came near to him and said:
We will build sheepfolds here for our livestock, and cities for our little ones
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: but we ourselves will be armed, ready to go before the children of Israel until we have brought them to their place; and our little ones will dwell in the fortified cities because of the inhabitants of the land
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: We will not return to our homes until every one of the children of Israel has received his inheritance
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: For we will not inherit with them on the other side of the Jordan and beyond, because our inheritance has fallen to us on this eastern side of the Jordan
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: Then Moses said to them:
If you do this thing, if you arm yourselves before the Lord for the war
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and all your armed men cross over the Jordan before the Lord until He has driven out His enemies from before Him
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and the land is subdued before the Lord, then afterward you may return and be blameless before the Lord and before Israel; and this land shall be your possession before the Lord
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But if you do not do so, then take note, you have sinned against the Lord; and be sure your sin will find you out
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Build cities for your little ones and folds for your sheep, and do what has proceeded out of your mouth
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben spoke to Moses, saying:
Your servants will do as my lord commands
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: Our little ones, our wives, our flocks, and all our livestock will be there in the cities of Gilead
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: but your servants will cross over, every man armed for war, before the Lord to battle, just as my lord says
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: So Moses gave command concerning them to Eleazar the priest, to Joshua the son of Nun, and to the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel
And Moses said to them:

If the children of Gad and the children of Reuben cross over the Jordan with you, every man armed for battle before the Lord, and the land is subdued before you, then you shall give them the land of Gilead as a possession
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But if they do not cross over armed with you, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Then the children of Gad and the children of Reuben answered, saying:
As the Lord has said to your servants, so we will do
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: We will cross over armed before the Lord into the land of Canaan, but the possession of our inheritance shall remain with us on this side of the Jordan
segments.speaker: Children of Gad and Reuben

segments.text: So Moses gave to the children of Gad, to the children of Reuben, and to half the tribe of Manasseh the son of Joseph, the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites and the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, the land with its cities within the borders, the cities of the surrounding country
And the children of Gad built Dibon and Ataroth and Aroer
Atroth and Shophan and Jazer and Jogbehah
Beth Nimrah and Beth Haran, fortified cities, and folds for sheep
And the children of Reuben built Heshbon and Elealeh and Kirjathaim
Nebo and Baal Meon (their names being changed) and Shibmah; and they gave other names to the cities which they built
And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead and took it, and dispossessed the Amorites who were in it
So Moses gave Gilead to Machir the son of Manasseh, and he dwelt in it
Also Jair the son of Manasseh went and took its small towns, and called them Havoth Jair
Then Nobah went and took Kenath and its villages, and he called it Nobah, after his own name
